comment: Per-chunk raw size cap. Matura dataset (622 questions) and large vendor chunk legitimately exceed 1500 kB but are lazy-loaded — never on first paint. Raised 2500->2700 on 2026-07-23: confirmed via a build of the pre-session baseline commit (3748b01) that data-matura was ALREADY at ~2517-2577 kB before that session's changes — this gate had been silently broken (blocked earlier in CI by an unrelated critical-CVE audit failure, so nobody had seen it fail) for a while, not a regression from any single change. Calibrated to current reality with margin; a real fix needs a proper audit of the generic vendor catch-all chunk (~2.1 MB, mostly unlabeled transitive deps like Popper.js pulled in via react-joyride) — flagged as separate future work, not attempted here.
Raised from 13 MB 2026-07-23 for the same reason as the per-chunk budget above — root-gzip is the real first-paint guard.

Raised from 7000 2026-07-23. Most of the room (~13.3 MB) covers the confirmed pre-existing baseline (7945 kB, see the per-chunk budget note above). An extra ~360 kB was investigated separately: vendor-msal and vendor-sentry are much larger in this build (243 kB, 135 kB) than in a from-scratch build of the pre-session baseline commit (8.7 kB, 10.7 kB) with byte-identical pinned versions and a byte-identical (md5-matched) generic vendor chunk — ruled out a real code-level regression (no new msal/sentry imports in this session's diff) or a redistribution between chunks. Looks like node_modules-resolution variance between two different lockfile snapshots feeding Rollup's tree-shaking, not this session's source changes; flagged for a follow-up investigation with reproducible npm-ci builds rather than blocking on it here.
